canonical_definition: A fine-grained, multi-task benchmark in Chinese for evaluating LLMs’ responsiveness to human feedback across error correction and response maintenance scenarios, using a weighted checklist evaluated by GPT-4o.
papers: Look Again, Think Slowly: Enhancing Visual Reflection in Vision-Language Models

definitions.text: A fine-grained, multi-task benchmark in Chinese for evaluating LLMs’ responsiveness to human feedback across error correction and response maintenance scenarios, using a weighted checklist evaluated by GPT-4o.
definitions.paper: Look Again, Think Slowly: Enhancing Visual Reflection in Vision-Language Models

relationships.paper: Look Again, Think Slowly: Enhancing Visual Reflection in Vision-Language Models
relationships.evidence: “we introduce FB-Bench, a fine-grained, multi-task benchmark designed to evaluate LLMs’ responsiveness to human feedback under real-world usage scenarios in Chinese.”

emnlp25: Look Again, Think Slowly: Enhancing Visual Reflection in Vision-Language Models

characterization: A fine-grained, multi-task benchmark in Chinese for evaluating LLMs’ responsiveness to human feedback across error correction and response maintenance scenarios, using a weighted checklist evaluated by GPT-4o.
